name: Kreuzberg
intro: Edgy, multicultural heart of Berlin's specialty coffee scene.

name: Neukölln
intro: A buzzy neighborhood packed with third-wave cafés and bakeries.

name: Mitte
intro: The historic center, home to refined coffee bars and roasteries.

name: Prenzlauer Berg
intro: Leafy streets and family-friendly cafés with serious coffee programs.
